about.title: About Shyama Pharma
about.subtitle: Three decades of trust in veterinary pharmaceutical distribution
about.intro: Founded in 1995 in Patna, Shyama Pharma has grown from a small veterinary medicine shop to one of Bihar's most trusted pharmaceutical distributors. We are proud super stockists of Nutrivet Farm Care and TTK Healthcare, serving veterinary professionals and livestock farmers across all 38 districts of Bihar.
about.milestone1Desc: Shyama Pharma established in Patna as a veterinary medicine wholesale shop, serving local veterinary doctors and farmers.
about.milestone2Desc: Expanded distribution network to cover multiple districts of Bihar. Built strong relationships with leading pharmaceutical companies.
about.milestone3Desc: Became super stockist for Nutrivet Farm Care and TTK Healthcare. Stockist network expanded to 25+ brands.
about.milestone4Desc: Now supplying 30+ brands across all 38 districts of Bihar. Trusted partner for veterinary professionals statewide.
about.missionText: To ensure every veterinary professional and livestock farmer in Bihar has reliable access to quality medicines at competitive prices, delivered with trust and timely service.
about.visionText: To be Bihar's most trusted and comprehensive veterinary pharmaceutical distribution partner, supporting the health of millions of animals and the livelihoods of farmers across the state.
